name: Odrisshyo
overview: Anis, a successful businessman and aspiring politician, suddenly gets abducted. Unable to escape his fate, he has to navigate a dangerous maze of blackmail, betrayal, and personal turmoil. Can he flee his captor and unmask him?

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Odrisshyo | Mahfuz Ahmed, Aupee Karim | Shafayet Mansoor Rana | 5th Oct | hoichoi
